faqs.question: How much does mosquito control cost in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Our mosquito control services in North Merrick range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout the mosquito season. Contact us for a free, customized quote based on your specific needs.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule mosquito treatments for my North Merrick property?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection in North Merrick, we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during mosquito season (typically May through September). Long Island's humid climate creates ideal breeding conditions, so regular treatments ensure continuous protection. We offer flexible scheduling and seasonal packages that maintain a mosquito-free barrier around your property.

faqs.question: Are your mosquito control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments dry quickly, and we typically recommend keeping children and pets inside for 30 minutes after application. Our technicians will provide specific guidelines based on the products used at your North Merrick property.

faqs.question: What areas do you treat for mosquitoes on my property?
faqs.answer: We provide comprehensive treatment of all outdoor areas where mosquitoes breed and rest, including lawns, shrubs, trees, patios, decks, and around standing water sources. We focus on shaded areas, vegetation, and potential breeding sites like gutters and planters. Our technicians inspect your entire North Merrick property to identify problem areas and deliver targeted treatments for maximum effectiveness.
